# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-012](task-0079): Provider Version Management

## Purpose

Manage provider versions.

## Scope

- Version format
- Upgrade logic
- Rollback

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement upgrade
3. Add rollback

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Upgrade works
3. Rollback works
